prompt: A satirical Spanish sports newspaper front page designed like a tabloid cover, full-frame and perfectly frontal, on slightly aged off-white newsprint with subtle paper texture, faint stains, and narrow black border lines. The masthead is a huge red SPORT logo across the top on a bright yellow banner. In the upper right, include 1 small interview promo box with a headshot of a footballer and the text block in Spanish: “ENTREVISTA CUBARSÍ ‘ESTOY PARA COSAS GRANDES’”. Under the masthead, add a yellow strip with bold black text “EXCLUSIVA MUNDIAL” and a small red lightning bolt. The main headline dominates the page in gigantic black condensed uppercase letters over 2 lines: “LAMILE FICHA POR LA PEÑA DEL BINGO”. Beneath it, add the subheadline in italic black Spanish text: “El crack pide dorsal el 10 y bocadillo de calamares en el contrato”. The main photo occupies the left-center and lower-middle of the page: a young footballer seen mostly from the back wearing a Barcelona home jersey in blue and garnet stripes, with the name “LAMILE” and the number “10” in large yellow lettering, standing in a celebratory stadium scene with confetti, bright lights, blurred fans, and people around him. He is holding or presenting a large bingo card board with the word “BINGO” at the top and “BINGO!” at the bottom. On the right side, create a vertical sidebar with 4 stacked content blocks: first, a photo of a calamari sandwich on a plate with the caption “El motivo del fichaje”; second, a red info box listing 3 humorous transfer facts in yellow and white text, exactly “EDAD: muy joven”, “FICHAJE: 4 cartones”, and “CLÁUSULA: una partida de parchís”; third, a quotes column with 3 stacked mini-items, each with a small portrait and Spanish caption: “XAVI: ‘No me lo esperaba, pero respeto’”, “LAPORTA: ‘Renegociaremos en el próximo bingo’”, and “EL VESTUARIO: Le preparan línea y bingo de bienvenida”; fourth, a small motorsport teaser at the bottom with a driver image and the text “FÓRMULA 1 ALONSO SUEÑA CON EL PODIO EN YEDA”. Along the bottom strip, include 3 small teaser panels: 1 woman footballer holding a trophy with the text “CHAMPIONS FEMENINA LA REINA AITANA QUIERE OTRA CORONA”, 1 basketball panel with two Barça players and the text “BÁSQUET EL BARÇA, A UN PAS DE LA FINAL FOUR”, and the Formula 1 teaser panel already integrated at the right edge. Add tiny newspaper metadata below the masthead on the left in Spanish, including issue number, date, and price, such as “Nº 16.743 MIÉRCOLES 22 DE ABRIL DE 2026 2,00 EUROS”. The overall style should be hyper-realistic printed newspaper cover photography and editorial layout, with authentic magazine typography, strong black headlines, saturated sports-photo colors, comedic transfer-rumor parody tone, and seamless believable print design.
